issue.title: st2.adguardcdn.com
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [http://st2.adguardcdn.com](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fst2.adguardcdn.com) ### Comment > If i turn the Filter back on your webpage that I am reporting this on will be completely blank therefore I cannot enable the filter and provide you with the screenshot you have requested, however I have tested this extensively and it appears that that an adguardcdn domain is being blocked preventing any website content from loading period. Every one of your webpages will either appear blank or only show one large logo and a mis formatted list of hyperlinks to your other services that will also be blank or a list of hyperlinks when loaded. I have disabled the rule for the domain that was appearing blank and will provide it for you here. st2.adguardcdn.com > > ``` Username: @Drewlius ``` ### Screenshots
